Operation 'getshowstories' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is too minimal. Added context about ordering, what Show HN stories represent in the domain, how to use the returned IDs, and clarified the response format for better AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and how to chain it with other operations.

data.current_description: Returns up to 200 Show HN story IDs.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves up to 200 Show HN story IDs in descending order by recency. Show HN stories are user-submitted items showcasing projects, products, or work. Returns an array of item IDs that can be used to fetch full item details via the item endpoint. Results are ordered from newest to oldest.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Added context about ordering, what Show HN stories represent in the domain, how to use the returned IDs, and clarified the response format for better AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and how to chain it with other operations.

message: Operation 'getupdates' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description lacks specificity about the response structure and use cases. Added details about the Updates schema structure (items and profiles arrays), clarified that it's useful for polling/monitoring, and explained the real-time nature of the data for better AI agent interpretability of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns the IDs of items and user profiles that have changed recently.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves IDs of items and user profiles that have been recently modified or created. Returns an Updates object containing two arrays: 'items' (item IDs with recent changes) and 'profiles' (user IDs with recent profile updates). Useful for polling to detect new content and profile modifications. Changes are tracked in real-time.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about the response structure and use cases. Added details about the Updates schema structure (items and profiles arrays), clarified that it's useful for polling/monitoring, and explained the real-time nature of the data for better AI agent interpretability of when and how to use this operation.
